# commit

**Instance Method**

Executes the operations on the database that created this batch builder object.

## Declaration

```swift
Promise<CloudKit.RecordsResponse, CloudKit.CKError> commit();
```

## Return Value

A `Promise` object that resolves to a RecordsResponse object if the operation succeeds; otherwise, a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit/CKError] object.
